hero.title: Recreational Tours
hero.subtitle: Discover Colombia through adventure activities, local gastronomy, and nature. Guided experiences with the option of controlled, optional consumption.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Get your answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our recreational tours across Colombia. If you have any additional questions, don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.imageAlt: Frequently asked questions about recreational tours

defaultFaqs.question: What kind of activities do the tours include?
defaultFaqs.answer: Our tours include recreational activities such as hiking, scenic nature walks, local gastronomy experiences, wellness and relaxation activities. We also offer the option of controlled, completely optional recreational consumption for those who wish.

defaultFaqs.question: What does the tour include?
defaultFaqs.answer: Our tours include transportation from designated meeting points, guided tours, recreational activities, local gastronomy tastings, informational materials, and a participation certificate. Premium packages include a full lunch and exclusive benefits.

defaultFaqs.question: Is recreational consumption mandatory?
defaultFaqs.answer: No, not at all. Recreational consumption is completely optional and never mandatory. Our tours are designed to be fully enjoyed without any consumption. It's simply an additional option available in a controlled, safe environment.

defaultFaqs.question: What is the duration of the tour?
defaultFaqs.answer: Duration varies by chosen package: Express Tours (3-4 hours), Standard Tours (5-6 hours), and Premium Tours (full day, 8 hours). All include time for transport, tours, activities, and breaks.

defaultFaqs.question: Can I take photos during the tour?
defaultFaqs.answer: Yes, you can take photos in designated areas. For participant safety and privacy, there are restricted zones where cameras aren't permitted. Our guides will show you when and where you can take photos.

defaultFaqs.question: What should I bring to the tour?
defaultFaqs.answer: We recommend comfortable clothing, closed hiking-appropriate shoes, sunscreen, camera, and a water bottle. For full-day tours, we suggest bringing extra snacks.

defaultFaqs.question: Are there age restrictions?
defaultFaqs.answer: Yes, our tours are exclusively for participants 18+. ID will be required at the start of the tour. This restriction applies to everyone with no exceptions.

defaultFaqs.question: How do I make a reservation?
defaultFaqs.answer: You can book directly on our website by selecting the desired package and available date. You can also contact us via WhatsApp or phone for personalized assistance. Reservations are confirmed with a 30% upfront payment.

security.label: Security and Trust
security.title: 100% Legal and Safe Operation
security.subtitle: Your peace of mind is our priority. We operate with the highest standards of legal compliance, safety, and quality to guarantee an exceptional, worry-free experience.

defaultFeatures.title: Legal Framework & Transparency
defaultFeatures.description: We operate under the Colombian legal framework with all required licenses. Transparent contracts, clear terms, and complete documentation available.

defaultFeatures.title: Privacy & Quality
defaultFeatures.description: Your data is secure with bank-level encryption. Rigorous quality and safety processes at every stage of our experiences.

defaultFeatures.title: Expert Guides
defaultFeatures.description: Trained and certified staff guaranteeing a safe, fun, and memorable experience on every tour.

defaultFeatures.title: Comprehensive Insurance
defaultFeatures.description: Insurance coverage for every participant throughout the entire tour experience, from start to finish.

testimonials.label: Voices of the Experience
testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the stories of those who have lived the {{siteName}} experience. Every testimonial reflects our commitment to quality, safety, and fun.

defaultTestimonials.name: María González
defaultTestimonials.content: A transformative experience. The tour allowed me to discover incredible Colombian landscapes and connect with wonderful people in a safe and professional environment. I'll be back for sure.

defaultTestimonials.name: Carlos Rodríguez
defaultTestimonials.content: As a nature lover, I was impressed by the destinations and the flawless organization. Every detail was carefully planned. Definitely a top-tier experience.

defaultTestimonials.name: Ana Sofía Martínez
defaultTestimonials.content: The local gastronomy was a revelation. Every dish told a story from the region and the presentation was flawless. A complete sensory experience.

defaultTestimonials.name: Diego Herrera
defaultTestimonials.content: Excellent balance between adventure and relaxation. The guides are experts and know how to adapt activities to each group's pace. Highly recommended.

defaultTestimonials.name: Laura Valencia
defaultTestimonials.content: Professionalism and passion in every detail. The tour gave me a completely new perspective on recreational tourism in Colombia. A must-do.

defaultTestimonials.name: Sebastián Mora
defaultTestimonials.content: The fusion of regional gastronomy and outdoor activities is fascinating. I discovered flavors and ingredients I'm already incorporating into my kitchen. A unique experience.
